raw_text:
<think>
We have a request from the user: "packet_id=HVSMW1-03C30A6F1E979B8E83F2 status_values: route_verdict=CONTINUE repair_target=stress-test and preserve blocker ids: ART-001-BLK-45E2B386 blocked_move=do not override blocker with consensus unless sources close it Return the three-line status record."

They want plain text record with three key=value lines. Fields: route_verdict, repair_target, blocked_move. Must include packet_id? The prompt says "Return the three-line status record." It doesn't say to include packet_id. So they just want the three lines.

We should output exactly three lines, each "key=value". Possibly including the values exactly as provided.

We need to follow formatting: plain text, no extra headings or JSON, just three lines.

Thus output:

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=stress-test and preserve blocker ids: ART-001-BLK-45E2B386
blocked_move=do not override blocker with consensus unless sources close it

Make sure no extra whitespace at ends.

Thus answer.
</think>

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=stress-test and preserve blocker ids: ART-001-BLK-45E2B386
blocked_move=do not override blocker with consensus unless sources close it
